title: More Re-dye Recipe│更多重染配方
description: Added new recipes for redying terracotta, glazed terracotta, banners, candles, concrete, concrete powder, glass, and glass plates.│新增重染陶瓦、帶釉陶瓦、旗幟、蠟燭、混凝土、混凝土粉末、玻璃、玻璃板的配方。
body:
# Function│功能
- You can re-dyed 8 items by placing the dye in the middle and surrounding it with 8 terracotta, glazed terracotta, concrete, concrete powder, glass, or glass panes.│你可以透過將1個染料放置在中間，將8個陶瓦、帶釉陶瓦、混凝土、混凝土粉末、玻璃或玻璃板圍繞染料放置來一次重染8個物品。
- By adding a dye to a banner or candle, you can re-dyed the item.│透過將1個旗幟或蠟燭加上1個染料可以將該物品進行重染。
